name: Invictus victory
notes: A mix of lemon, pink pepper, lavender, vanilla, and incense creates a sweet, spicy, and smoky fragrance with a strong, sensual masculine vibe.
description: Invictus Victory Parfum is a sweet, warm, and intense men’s fragrance that blends vanilla and incense with citrus and lavender for a bold, seductive, and long-lasting scent.

name: 1 MILLION ROYAL
notes: A mix of lavender, bergamot, cedarwood, and benzoin creates a fresh, sweet, and woody fragrance with a smooth, modern masculine finish.
description: 1 Million Royal Parfum is a modern, sweet-spicy men’s fragrance that blends fresh citrus and lavender with warm woods and vanilla for a bold, refined, and powerful scent.

name: 1 Million Eau de Toilette
notes: A mix of blood mandarin, cinnamon, leather, amber, and tonka bean creates a sweet, spicy, and slightly woody scent with a strong, playful masculine vibe.
description: 1 Million Eau de Toilette is a sweet, spicy men’s fragrance that blends fresh citrus and cinnamon with warm leather and amber for a bold, flashy, and attention-grabbing scent.

name: Grand Soir Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of amber, benzoin, vanilla, tonka bean, and labdanum creates a rich, warm, and slightly sweet resinous scent with a smooth, cozy elegance.
description: Grand Soir Eau de Parfum is a warm, rich amber fragrance that blends resinous benzoin and vanilla with tonka bean and woods for a deep, cozy, and elegant nighttime scent.

name: Oud Silk Mood Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of oud, Bulgarian rose, chamomile, and papyrus wood creates a soft, floral-woody scent with a smooth, silky, and slightly smoky finish.
description: Oud Silk Mood Eau de Parfum is a smooth, elegant oud fragrance that blends soft rose and creamy woods with light incense for a refined, silky, and luxurious Middle Eastern-inspired scent.

name: Baccarat Rouge 540 Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of saffron, jasmine, amberwood, and cedar creates a sweet, airy, and slightly woody scent with a glowing, long-lasting luxury finish.
description: Baccarat Rouge 540 Eau de Parfum is a sweet, airy, and luxurious amber-woody fragrance that blends saffron and jasmine with amberwood and cedar for a radiant, long-lasting signature scent.

name: Baccarat Rouge 540 Extrait de Parfum
notes: A mix of saffron, jasmine, bitter almond, amberwood, and cedar creates a sweet, airy, and slightly woody scent with an intense, long-lasting luxury feel.
description: Baccarat Rouge 540 Extrait de Parfum is a rich, intense, and long-lasting amber-woody fragrance that blends saffron, almond-like sweetness, and deep woods for a bold, luxurious, and addictive scent.

name: Ombre Nomade
notes: A mix of oud, rose, incense, raspberry, and amberwood creates a deep, smoky, and slightly sweet woody scent with a strong, luxurious presence.
description: Ombre Nomade Eau de Parfum is a dark, smoky oud fragrance that blends rich rose, incense, and leather with deep woods for a powerful, intense, and luxury Middle Eastern-inspired scent.

name: Pacific Chill
notes: A mix of lemon, orange, mint, fig, and musk creates a fresh, green, and slightly sweet scent with a cool, energizing feel.
description: Pacific Chill Eau de Parfum is a fresh, green-fruity fragrance that blends citrus, mint, and fig with soft musk for a clean, uplifting, and “detox juice” style scent.

name: Afternoon Swim
notes: A mix of mandarin, orange, bergamot, and amber creates a sparkling, juicy citrus scent with a light, refreshing, beach-day feel.
description: Afternoon Swim Eau de Parfum is a bright, ultra-fresh citrus fragrance that blends juicy orange and mandarin with light amber for a simple, energetic, and summer-style scent.

name: L'Immensité
notes: A mix of grapefruit, ginger, amber, and watery notes creates a fresh, citrusy, and slightly spicy scent with a clean and modern masculine feel.
description: L'Immensité Eau de Parfum is a fresh, airy men’s fragrance that blends citrus, ginger, and amber with clean watery notes for a crisp, modern, and uplifting scent.

name: Imagination
notes: A mix of citrus, neroli, black tea, and ambroxan creates a bright, fresh, and slightly musky scent with a smooth, elegant finish.
description: Imagination Eau de Parfum is a fresh, clean, and modern men’s fragrance that blends bright citrus and tea notes with smooth amber and woods for an airy, luxurious, and uplifting scent.

name: An0ther 13 Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of ambroxan, musk, pear, and soft jasmine creates a clean, airy, and slightly sweet skin-like scent with a smooth modern finish.
description: Another 13 Eau de Parfum is a clean, musky, and airy unisex fragrance that blends ambroxan, musk, and subtle pear notes for a soft, skin-like, modern scent.

name: Santal 33 Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of sandalwood, cedar, cardamom, leather, and violet creates a dry, smoky-woody scent with a clean, modern, and slightly spicy edge.
description: Santal 33 Eau de Parfum is a woody, smoky unisex fragrance that blends creamy sandalwood, cedar, and leather with soft spices and musk for a dry, modern, and minimalist scent.

name: La Vie Est Belle Eau De Parfum
notes: A mix of pear, iris, jasmine, vanilla, and praline creates a sweet, powdery, and creamy fragrance with a warm and uplifting feminine finish.
description: La Vie Est Belle Eau de Parfum is a sweet floral-gourmand women’s fragrance that blends pear, iris, and orange blossom with vanilla and praline for a warm, happy, and feminine scent.

name: Angels Share Eau de Parfum
notes: A rich mix of cognac, cinnamon, tonka bean, vanilla, and oak creates a warm, sweet, and boozy fragrance with a deep dessert-like luxury feel.
description: Angels' Share Eau de Parfum is a warm, boozy gourmand fragrance that blends cognac, cinnamon, and vanilla with praline and woods for a rich, sweet, and cozy luxury scent.

name: YUM BOUJEE MARSHMALLOW | 81 Eau de Parfum Intense
notes: A mix of marshmallow, vanilla, strawberry, whipped cream, and musk creates a sweet, airy, and creamy dessert-like fragrance with a soft cozy finish.
description: YUM BOUJEE MARSHMALLOW | 81 Eau de Parfum Intense is a sweet, fluffy gourmand fragrance that blends marshmallow, whipped cream, and vanilla with soft fruits and musk for an ultra-sweet, playful, and cozy scent.

name: Gaultier Divine Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of lily, salty meringue, jasmine, and vanilla creates a sweet, floral-gourmand scent with a creamy, airy, and modern feminine feel.
description: Gaultier Divine Eau de Parfum is a radiant, sweet-floral women’s fragrance that blends salty meringue, white flowers, and creamy vanilla for a bold, modern, and feminine scent.

name: Ultra Male
notes: A mix of pear, cinnamon, lavender, vanilla, and amber creates a sweet, fruity-spicy fragrance with a strong, attention-grabbing masculine vibe.
description: Ultra Male is a sweet, bold, and highly intense men’s fragrance that mixes juicy pear, warm vanilla, and spices for a dark, playful, and nightlife-ready scent.

name: Le Male Le Parfum
notes: A smooth mix of lavender, iris, vanilla, and amber creates a sweet, powdery, and woody fragrance with a rich and seductive masculine finish.
description: Le Male Le Parfum is a warm, sweet, and elegant men’s fragrance that blends lavender, iris, and vanilla with smooth woods for a modern, seductive, and long-lasting scent.

name: Le Beau Le Parfum
notes: A mix of coconut, pineapple, tonka bean, and sandalwood creates a creamy, sweet, and tropical fragrance with a warm masculine finish.
description: Le Beau Le Parfum is a warm, sweet, and tropical men’s fragrance that blends coconut, tonka bean, and woods for a smooth, seductive, and beachy-sweet scent.

name: Le Male Elixir Parfum
notes: A rich mix of lavender, tonka bean, honey, vanilla, and amber creates a sweet, creamy, and spicy fragrance with strong projection and a warm masculine finish.
description: Le Male Elixir Parfum is a sweet, warm, and intense men’s fragrance that blends lavender, tonka bean, and vanilla with amber and woods for a bold, seductive, and modern scent.

name: Side Effect Eau de Parfum
notes: A rich mix of rum, tobacco, cinnamon, vanilla, and sandalwood creates a sweet, smoky, and spicy fragrance with a strong sensual vibe.
description: Side Effect Eau de Parfum is a warm, boozy, and spicy unisex fragrance that blends rum, tobacco, cinnamon, and vanilla for a deep, seductive, and powerful scent.

name: Oud For Greatness Eau de Parfum
notes: A bold mix of oud, saffron, nutmeg, lavender, and patchouli creates a deep, spicy, and woody fragrance with a strong luxurious presence.
description: Oud For Greatness Eau de Parfum is a powerful, luxury oud fragrance that blends rich oud, saffron, and spices with smooth musk and patchouli for a dark, intense, and commanding scent.

name: Boss Bottled Absolu Parfum Intense
notes: A mix of apple, incense, leather, patchouli, and cedarwood creates a dark, spicy-woody scent with a slightly sweet and intense masculine finish.
description: Boss Bottled Absolu Parfum Intense is a deep, rich men’s fragrance that blends warm woods, resin, and leather with a smooth sweetness for a bold, mature, and long-lasting scent.

name: Terre d'Hermes Parfum
notes: A blend of orange, grapefruit, flint, oakmoss, and woody notes creates a fresh, earthy, and slightly smoky fragrance with a classy masculine feel.
description: Terre d'Hermès Parfum is a rich woody-citrus men’s fragrance that blends bright orange with earthy vetiver and warm woods for a refined, natural, and sophisticated scent.

name: Guilty Pour Femme Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of mandora, pink pepper, lilac, patchouli, and vanilla creates a sweet, floral, and slightly spicy fragrance with a rich feminine finish.
description: Guilty Pour Femme Eau de Parfum is a warm floral-amber women’s fragrance that blends mandora fruit, lilac, and patchouli with soft vanilla for a bold, sensual, and elegant scent.

name: Guilty Pour Homme Eau de Toilette
notes: A blend of lemon, lavender, orange blossom, and cedarwood creates a fresh, slightly spicy, and woody fragrance with a smooth masculine feel.
description: Guilty Pour Homme Eau de Toilette is a fresh, aromatic men’s fragrance that blends citrus, lavender, and warm woods for a clean, modern, and confident masculine scent.

name: Bloom Eau de Parfum
notes: A lush mix of jasmine bud, tuberose, and rangoon creeper creates a creamy, floral, and fresh feminine fragrance with a natural blooming feel.
description: Bloom Eau de Parfum is a rich white floral women’s fragrance that blends jasmine, tuberose, and rangoon creeper for a natural, elegant, and garden-inspired scent.

name: Flora Gorgeous Gardenia Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of pear blossom, gardenia, jasmine, and brown sugar creates a sweet, creamy, and floral fragrance with a warm feminine finish.
description: Flora Gorgeous Gardenia Eau de Parfum is a sweet floral women’s fragrance that blends creamy gardenia and jasmine with juicy pear and brown sugar for a playful, feminine, and soft scent.

name: Flora Gorgeous Jasmine Eau de Parfum
notes: A blend of jasmine grandiflorum, mandarin, magnolia, and sandalwood creates a floral, fruity, and slightly creamy fragrance with a cheerful feminine feel.
description: Flora Gorgeous Jasmine Eau de Parfum is a bright floral women’s fragrance that blends radiant jasmine with mandarin and soft sandalwood for a fresh, sweet, and elegant feminine scent.

name: Light Blue Pour Homme Eau de Toilette
notes: A crisp mix of grapefruit, bergamot, rosemary, and musk creates a fresh, aquatic, and citrusy masculine fragrance with a bright Mediterranean feel.
description: Light Blue Pour Homme Eau de Toilette is a fresh, citrusy men’s fragrance that blends Sicilian citrus, marine notes, and soft woods for a clean, energetic, and summer-inspired scent.

name: Hypnotic Poison Eau de Toilette
notes: A rich mix of almond, vanilla, jasmine, and musk creates a sweet, creamy, and sensual fragrance with a bold feminine feel.
description: Hypnotic Poison is a warm, sweet, and seductive women’s fragrance that blends creamy vanilla and almond with rich jasmine and musk for a deep, addictive scent.

name: Miss Dior Eau de Parfum
notes: A blend of rose, peony, iris, and musk creates a fresh, soft, and floral scent with a clean and romantic finish.
description: Miss Dior Eau de Parfum is a fresh, romantic floral women’s fragrance that blends rose, lily-of-the-valley, and soft musk with a light sweetness for an elegant and feminine scent.

name: Dior Homme Parfum
notes: A mix of iris, leather, amber, and vetiver creates a powdery, woody, and slightly sweet scent with a deep, classy masculine finish.
description: Dior Homme Parfum is a rich, elegant men’s fragrance that blends smooth iris with warm leather and deep woods for a dark, sophisticated, and refined scent.

name: Sauvage Elixir Eau de Parfum
notes: A bold mix of grapefruit, cinnamon, nutmeg, lavender, and sandalwood creates a spicy, sweet, and very strong masculine fragrance with heavy projection.
description: Sauvage Elixir Eau de Parfum is a highly concentrated, dark, and spicy men’s fragrance that blends rich cinnamon, lavender, and grapefruit with deep woods for an intense, powerful, and long-lasting scent.

name: Sauvage Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of bergamot, Sichuan pepper, lavender, and ambroxan creates a fresh, spicy, and slightly sweet woody scent with strong projection.
description: Sauvage Eau de Parfum is a fresh yet warm men’s fragrance that blends spicy pepper and citrus with smooth amber and vanilla for a bold, clean, and masculine scent.

name: Himalaya
notes: A blend of bergamot, grapefruit, sandalwood, and musk creates a fresh, airy, and slightly woody scent with a cool, clean finish.
description: Creed Himalaya is a fresh, clean, and slightly woody men’s fragrance that blends citrus, soft spices, and musk for a crisp, icy mountain-inspired scent.

name: Millesime Imperial
notes: A mix of sea salt, bergamot, iris, and musk creates a fresh, slightly fruity marine scent with a smooth, classy finish.
description: Millesime Imperial is a fresh, salty-sweet luxury fragrance that blends citrus, marine notes, and soft woods for a clean, elegant, and sunny upscale scent.

name: Virgin Island Water
notes: A tropical mix of lime, coconut, white flowers, and rum creates a fresh, sweet, and sunny scent that feels like a beach vacation.
description: Virgin Island Water is a bright, tropical unisex fragrance that blends lime, coconut, and white florals with rum and musk for a fresh, beachy, vacation-style scent.

name: Silver Mountain Water
notes: A fresh mix of bergamot, green tea, blackcurrant, and musk creates a clean, crisp, and slightly fruity scent with a cool airy feel.
description: Silver Mountain Water is a clean, fresh, and airy unisex fragrance that blends crisp citrus and green tea with musky woods for a smooth, icy, and elegant scent inspired by mountain air.

name: Absolu Aventus Eau de Parfum
notes: A bold mix of pineapple, grapefruit, spices, and smoky woods creates a deeper, more intense version of Aventus with stronger warmth and depth.
description: Absolu Aventus Eau de Parfum is a richer, darker take on Aventus that blends juicy pineapple and citrus with deeper smoky woods and spice for a more intense, luxury masculine scent.

name: Creed Aventus
notes: A mix of pineapple, bergamot, birch, and musk creates a fresh yet smoky fruity-woody scent with a strong, masculine presence.
description: Creed Aventus is a bold, luxury men’s fragrance that blends fruity pineapple and blackcurrant with smoky birch and rich woods for a powerful, confident, and iconic scent.

name: ALLURE HOMME SPORT Eau de Toilette Spray
notes: A crisp blend of orange, sea notes, neroli, and tonka bean creates a fresh, sporty, and slightly creamy masculine fragrance.
description: ALLURE HOMME SPORT Eau de Toilette Spray is a fresh, sporty men’s fragrance that combines bright citrus and sea notes with smooth woods and tonka bean for a clean, energetic, and versatile scent.

name: BLEU DE CHANEL Eau de Parfum Spray
notes: A refined mix of grapefruit, ginger, incense, and cedarwood creates a fresh, woody, and slightly smoky fragrance with a classy modern feel.
description: BLEU DE CHANEL Eau de Parfum Spray is a fresh, woody men’s fragrance that blends bright citrus, aromatic woods, and smooth incense for a clean, sophisticated, and versatile masculine scent.

name: CHANCE EAU TENDRE Eau de Parfum Spray
notes: A light mix of grapefruit, quince, jasmine, and white musk creates a clean, fruity-floral fragrance with a soft and feminine feel.
description: CHANCE EAU TENDRE Eau de Parfum Spray is a soft, fruity-floral women’s fragrance that blends juicy grapefruit and quince with delicate jasmine and white musk for a fresh, romantic, and elegant scent.

name: CHANCE EAU SPLENDIDE Eau de Parfum Spray
notes: A vibrant mix of citrus, raspberry, rose, and white musk creates a fresh, fruity, and airy floral fragrance with a smooth feminine finish.
description: CHANCE EAU SPLENDIDE Eau de Parfum Spray is a bright, fruity-floral women’s fragrance that blends sparkling citrus and juicy raspberry with elegant rose and soft musk for a fresh, playful, and sophisticated scent.

name: COCO MADEMOISELLE Eau de Parfum Intense Spray
notes: A rich mix of citrus, rose, patchouli, vanilla, and tonka bean creates a warm, smooth, and long-lasting floral-amber fragrance with a luxurious feel.
description: COCO MADEMOISELLE Eau de Parfum Intense Spray is a deeper, warmer version of the original fragrance that blends rich patchouli, vanilla, and tonka bean with soft florals for a bold, sensual, and elegant feminine scent.

name: COCO MADEMOISELLE Eau de Parfum Spray
notes: A blend of orange, rose, jasmine, patchouli, and vanilla creates a fresh, floral, and slightly warm scent with a classy, feminine finish.
description: Coco Mademoiselle Eau de Parfum Spray is a fresh yet sensual women’s fragrance that blends bright citrus and rose with smooth patchouli and vanilla for a clean, elegant, and long-lasting luxury scent.

name: Bad Boy Elixir Eau de Parfum with Woody Leather
notes: A mix of incense, leather, cedarwood, and tonka bean creates a smoky, woody, and slightly sweet masculine scent with strong intensity.
description: Bad Boy Elixir Eau de Parfum is a dark, woody-leather men’s fragrance that combines spicy incense and warm woods with smooth leather for a deep, bold, and intense nighttime scent.

name: Good Girl Blush Eau de Parfum with Floral Vanilla
notes: A mix of peony, bergamot, ylang-ylang, and vanilla creates a sweet, airy floral scent with a soft, creamy finish.
description: Good Girl Blush Eau de Parfum is a soft, floral-vanilla women’s fragrance that blends fresh peony and citrus with creamy vanilla and tonka bean for a light, romantic, and feminine scent.

name: Hero Eau de Parfum
notes: A blend of cedarwood, juniper, and resinous amber notes creates a fresh, woody, and slightly spicy scent with a clean, modern masculine feel.
description: Burberry Hero Eau de Parfum is a warm, woody men’s fragrance that mixes spicy juniper and cedarwood with smooth amyris and benzoin for a strong but refined masculine scent.

name: Her Eau de Toilette
notes: A fresh mix of strawberry, raspberry, jasmine, and musk creates a sweet, clean, and soft feminine scent that feels light and easy to wear.
description: Burberry Her Eau de Toilette (White) is a light, fruity-floral women’s fragrance that blends fresh berries with soft white florals and clean musk for a bright, airy, and everyday wearable scent.

name: Madison Ave Eau de Parfum
notes: A fresh mix of apple, blackberry, rose, and patchouli creates a sweet, floral, and slightly woody scent with a clean luxury feel.
description: Madison Ave Eau de Parfum is a fruity-floral luxury fragrance that blends crisp apple and blackberry with elegant rose and jasmine over a smooth woody base for a polished, high-end New York vibe.

name: Greenwich Village Eau de Parfum
notes: A blend of cassis, lychee, vanilla, and amber creates a sweet, fruity, and creamy scent with a soft, modern luxury feel.
description: Greenwich Village Eau de Parfum is a fruity-sweet gourmand fragrance that mixes juicy berries with creamy vanilla and soft woods for a smooth, playful, and luxury New York vibe.

name: New York Nights Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of gardenia, jasmine, caramel, and coffee creates a sweet, creamy, and slightly floral scent with a bold nightlife vibe.
description: New York Nights Eau de Parfum is a rich, sweet, and floral-gourmand unisex fragrance that blends creamy florals with caramel and coffee notes for a warm, nightlife-inspired New York scent.

name: Lafayette Street Eau de Parfum
notes: A blend of green apple, coriander, vanilla, and amberwood creates a fresh, sweet, and slightly spicy scent with a smooth, modern feel.
description: Lafayette Street Eau de Parfum is a fresh-sweet, modern unisex fragrance that mixes crisp apple and spice with smooth vanilla and amber woods for a clean yet slightly seductive New York luxury vibe.

name: TriBeCa Eau de Parfum
notes: A smooth mix of cacao, hazelnut, jasmine, and cedarwood creates a sweet, nutty, and slightly floral gourmand scent with a luxury feel.
description: TriBeCa Eau de Parfum is a sweet, gourmand unisex fragrance that blends creamy cocoa, hazelnut, and jasmine with warm woods for a rich, luxury New York vibe scent.

name: The Most Wanted Parfum
notes: A rich mix of ginger, woody notes, and creamy vanilla creates a bold, sweet, and intense masculine scent with strong nightlife energy.
description: The Most Wanted Parfum is a dark, sweet, and spicy men’s fragrance that blends warm woods, vanilla, and red ginger into a powerful, seductive scent made for night outs and cold weather.

name: Sì Passione Eau de Parfum
notes: A bright blend of pear, blackcurrant, rose, and vanilla creates a sweet, warm, and powerful feminine fragrance with a passionate vibe.
description: Sì Passione Eau de Parfum is a bold, fruity-floral women’s fragrance that mixes juicy pear and blackcurrant with rose and vanilla for a sweet, confident, and feminine scent.

name: Acqua di Giò Eau de Toilette
notes: A refreshing mix of bergamot, marine notes, jasmine, and cedarwood creates a light, crisp, and timeless masculine fragrance.
description: Acqua di Giò Eau de Toilette is a clean, fresh, and aquatic men’s fragrance inspired by the ocean, blending citrus and marine notes with soft woods for an easy everyday scent.

name: Acqua Di Giò Profumo
notes: A refined blend of sea notes, bergamot, incense, and patchouli gives this fragrance a fresh yet smoky and sophisticated feel.
description: Acqua Di Giò Profumo is a fresh, aquatic men’s fragrance that combines clean marine notes with smoky incense and dark woods for a smooth, masculine, and classy scent.

name: Emporio Armani Stronger With You Intensely Eau de Parfum
notes: A rich mix of pink pepper, cinnamon, vanilla, and amber woods creates a warm, sweet, and long-lasting masculine scent.
description: Emporio Armani Stronger With You Intensely Eau de Parfum is a deep, sweet, and spicy men’s fragrance that blends warm vanilla, cinnamon, and amber woods into a powerful scent made for confidence, nightlife, and cold weather.

name: Oud Wood Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of oud, sandalwood, cardamom, rosewood, and vanilla creates a soft, woody, and slightly spicy scent with a smooth and refined luxury finish.
description: Oud Wood Eau de Parfum is a smooth, warm oud fragrance that blends smoky woods, spices, and vanilla for a refined, soft, and luxurious woody scent that is not too harsh or animalic.

name: Polo Blue Eau de Toilette
notes: A mix of melon, cucumber, mandarin, basil, and musk creates a fresh, watery, and slightly fruity scent with a relaxed masculine feel.
description: Polo Blue Eau de Toilette is a fresh, aquatic men’s fragrance that blends crisp melon and citrus with aromatic herbs and soft woods for a clean, sporty, and easy everyday scent.

name: Luna Rossa Ocean Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of bergamot, lavender, iris, and vanilla creates a fresh, slightly sweet aquatic scent with a smooth and modern masculine finish.
description: Luna Rossa Ocean Eau de Parfum is a fresh, modern men’s fragrance that blends citrus and aromatic notes with smooth vanilla and woods for a clean, sporty, and slightly sweet ocean-inspired scent.

name: Paradoxe Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of neroli, pear, jasmine, orange blossom, vanilla, and musk creates a fresh, floral, and slightly sweet scent with a soft and elegant finish.
description: Paradoxe Eau de Parfum is a modern floral-amber women’s fragrance that blends bright neroli and pear with white florals and soft vanilla musk for a fresh, elegant, and slightly sweet signature scent.

name: Valaya Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of bergamot, white peach, orange blossom, and musk creates a clean, airy, and slightly sweet floral scent with a soft, silky finish.
description: Valaya Eau de Parfum is a clean, soft, and elegant floral-musky fragrance that blends white florals, citrus, and airy musk for a fresh, smooth, and luxurious “clean skin” scent.

name: Delina Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of lychee, rhubarb, rose, peony, and musk creates a fruity-floral scent with a fresh, slightly tart sweetness and a soft elegant finish.
description: Delina Eau de Parfum is a bright, elegant floral women’s fragrance that blends juicy lychee and rhubarb with rich rose and soft musk for a fresh, sweet, and sophisticated scent.

name: Greenley Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of green apple, bergamot, cedarwood, and musk creates a crisp, fresh, and slightly sweet scent with a clean and energetic masculine feel.
description: Greenley Eau de Parfum is a fresh, green, and slightly fruity men’s fragrance that blends crisp apple and citrus with woods and musk for a clean, energetic, and modern scent.

name: Layton Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of apple, vanilla, lavender, cardamom, and woods creates a sweet, spicy, and slightly fresh scent with a smooth, classy masculine finish.
description: Layton Eau de Parfum is a warm, sweet, and spicy men’s fragrance that blends crisp apple and vanilla with lavender and woods for a smooth, elegant, and crowd-pleasing scent.

name: Haltane Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of bergamot, lavender, saffron, praline, and oud creates a fresh, woody, and slightly sweet scent with a smooth, luxurious masculine finish.
description: Haltane Eau de Parfum is a fresh yet dark woody fragrance that blends aromatic herbs and saffron with rich oud and praline for a modern, luxurious, and slightly sweet masculine scent.

name: Althair Eau de Parfum
notes: A mix of vanilla, cinnamon, cardamom, almond, and amberwood creates a sweet, creamy, and slightly spicy fragrance with a smooth, rich masculine finish.
description: Althaïr Eau de Parfum is a warm, sweet, and refined men’s fragrance that blends creamy vanilla and almond with cinnamon and woods for a smooth, luxurious, and modern gourmand scent.

name: Invictus
notes: A mix of grapefruit, marine notes, bay leaf, and ambergris creates a fresh, slightly sweet, and woody aquatic scent with a sporty masculine feel.
description: Invictus Eau de Toilette is a fresh, sporty men’s fragrance that blends citrus, marine notes, and woody amber for a clean, energetic, and youthful scent.

name: Baccarat Rouge 540 Extrait de Parfum
notes: A mix of saffron, jasmine, bitter almond, amberwood, and cedar creates a sweet, airy, and slightly woody scent with an intense, long-lasting luxury feel.
description: Baccarat Rouge 540 Extrait de Parfum is a rich, intense, and long-lasting amber-woody fragrance that blends saffron, almond-like sweetness, and deep woods for a bold, luxurious, and addictive scent.

name: Dior J'adore Infinissime Eau de Parfum
notes: A lush mix of tuberose, jasmine sambac, rose, and sandalwood creates a creamy, floral, and warm feminine fragrance with a radiant finish.
description: Dior J'adore Infinissime Eau de Parfum is a rich floral women’s fragrance that blends creamy tuberose and jasmine with soft sandalwood for a sensual, elegant, and luxurious scent.

name: Polo Blue Eau de Toilette
notes: Melon, cucumber, mandarin, basil, sage, geranium, suede, musk, and woods.
description: Polo Blue Eau de Toilette is a clean, aquatic-fresh scent with crisp fruit, aromatic herbs, and a smooth musky wood base. It is an easy everyday choice with a cool, classic profile.

name: Fucking Fabulous Eau de Parfum
notes: Clary sage, lavender, bitter almond, leather, tonka bean, vanilla, amber, and cashmeran.
description: Fucking Fabulous Eau de Parfum is a bold amber-leather fragrance with almond sweetness, aromatic lavender, and a creamy tonka-vanilla base. It feels rich, confident, and nightlife ready.

name: Neroli Portofino Eau de Parfum
notes: Neroli, bergamot, lemon, mandarin, orange blossom, lavender, amber, and musk.
description: Neroli Portofino Eau de Parfum captures a crisp Mediterranean citrus feel with sparkling neroli, bright bergamot, and clean amber musk. It is fresh, polished, and warm-weather ready.

name: Ombre Leather Eau de Parfum
notes: Cardamom, jasmine sambac, black leather, patchouli, amber, and moss.
description: Ombre Leather Eau de Parfum is a smooth leather scent with spicy cardamom, soft florals, and earthy amber woods. It has a refined, long-wearing profile with a confident drydown.

name: Black Orchid Eau de Parfum
notes: Black truffle, ylang-ylang, black orchid, dark chocolate, incense, patchouli, vanilla, and amber.
description: Black Orchid Eau de Parfum is a deep floral-amber fragrance with dark orchid, spice, chocolate warmth, and earthy woods. It is dramatic, luxurious, and built for a statement finish.

name: Lost Cherry Eau de Parfum
notes: Black cherry, bitter almond, rose, jasmine sambac, tonka bean, Peru balsam, vanilla, and woods.
description: Lost Cherry Eau de Parfum blends juicy cherry with almond, florals, and a warm vanilla-tonka base. It is sweet, seductive, and polished with a smooth amber finish.

name: Vanilla Sex Eau de Parfum
notes: Bitter almond, vanilla tincture, vanilla absolute, tonka bean, sandalwood, and soft florals.
description: Vanilla Sex Eau de Parfum is a creamy vanilla fragrance with almond facets, tonka warmth, and smooth woods. It is plush, sweet, and designed for a bold gourmand impression.

name: Tobacco Vanille Eau de Parfum
notes: Tobacco leaf, spice, vanilla, cacao, tonka bean, dried fruit, and woods.
description: Tobacco Vanille Eau de Parfum is a warm amber-spice scent with rich tobacco, creamy vanilla, cacao, and dried fruit. It is smooth, opulent, and ideal for cooler evenings.

name: Born in Roma Intense Eau de Parfum
notes: Vanilla bourbon, lavender, vetiver, jasmine, benzoin, and warm amber.
description: Born in Roma Intense Eau de Parfum is a warm floral-amber scent with creamy vanilla, aromatic lavender, and polished woods. It is bold, modern, and made for a lasting impression.

name: Uomo Born in Roma Eau de Toilette
notes: Mineral salt, violet leaf, ginger, sage, vetiver, and smoky woods.
description: Uomo Born in Roma Eau de Toilette is a modern woody-aromatic scent with mineral freshness, spicy ginger, and smooth vetiver. It is clean, masculine, and easy to wear day to night.

name: Valentino Uomo Born in Roma Eau de Toilette
notes: Violet leaf, ginger, sage, mineral accord, vetiver, and smoked woods.
description: Valentino Uomo Born in Roma Eau de Toilette delivers fresh spice, mineral woods, and aromatic herbs in a polished designer profile. It feels crisp, confident, and versatile.

name: Eros Eau de Parfum
notes: Mint, green apple, lemon, geranium, ambroxan, tonka bean, vanilla, cedar, and vetiver.
description: Eros Eau de Parfum is a powerful amber-fresh fragrance with mint, apple, citrus, vanilla, and woods. It is energetic, sweet, and built for strong projection.

name: Eros Flame Eau de Parfum
notes: Mandarin, black pepper, rosemary, geranium, rose, tonka bean, vanilla, cedar, and patchouli.
description: Eros Flame Eau de Parfum adds warm spice and citrus brightness to the Eros profile. Mandarin, pepper, vanilla, and woods create a bold, fiery scent with a smooth drydown.

name: Erba Pura Eau de Parfum
notes: Orange, lemon, bergamot, Mediterranean fruits, white musk, amber, and vanilla.
description: Erba Pura Eau de Parfum is a bright fruity-amber scent with sparkling citrus, juicy fruit, white musk, and creamy vanilla. It is vibrant, sweet, and attention grabbing.

name: Cruz Del Sur II Eau de Parfum
notes: Mango, pineapple, apple blossom, guava, blackcurrant, dried fruit, milk, vetiver, and musk.
description: Cruz Del Sur II Eau de Parfum is a tropical fruity fragrance with mango, pineapple, creamy nuances, and a soft musky base. It is lush, playful, and elevated.

name: Libre Eau de Parfum
notes: Lavender, mandarin, orange blossom, jasmine, vanilla, cedar, ambergris, and musk.
description: Libre Eau de Parfum is a floral aromatic scent built around lavender, orange blossom, vanilla, and clean woods. It is polished, confident, and signature-scent worthy.

name: Mon Paris Eau de Parfum
notes: Strawberry, raspberry, pear, datura flower, peony, jasmine, patchouli, white musk, and ambrox.
description: Mon Paris Eau de Parfum is a sweet fruity-floral fragrance with berry brightness, soft white florals, and a clean patchouli-musk base. It feels romantic, sparkling, and modern.

name: Black Opium Eau de Parfum Over Red
notes: Cherry accord, coffee, vanilla, jasmine, orange blossom, patchouli, and warm woods.
description: Black Opium Eau de Parfum Over Red adds a juicy cherry twist to the coffee-vanilla Black Opium signature. It is warm, sweet, and bold with a nightlife-ready finish.

name: MYSLF Eau de Parfum
notes: Bergamot, orange blossom, clary sage, ambrofix, patchouli, and woods.
description: MYSLF Eau de Parfum is a modern woody-floral scent with crisp bergamot, orange blossom, and textured woods. It is clean, smooth, and versatile for daily wear.

name: Born in Roma Donna Eau de Parfum
notes: Blackcurrant, pink pepper, jasmine grandiflorum, jasmine tea, vanilla bourbon, and cashmeran.
description: Born in Roma Donna Eau de Parfum is a modern floral fragrance with bright fruit, jasmine, and a warm vanilla-wood base. It is elegant, feminine, and polished for everyday luxury.

name: Born in Roma Ivory Donna Eau de Parfum
notes: Citrus, orange blossom, jasmine, vanilla, musks, and smooth woods.
description: Born in Roma Ivory Donna Eau de Parfum is a soft floral scent with luminous citrus, white florals, and creamy woods. It has a clean, elegant feel with a refined designer trail.

name: Born in Roma Uomo Eau de Parfum
notes: Violet leaf, sage, ginger, vanilla, vetiver, amber, and mineral woods.
description: Born in Roma Uomo Eau de Parfum is a warm amber-woody fragrance with aromatic herbs, spice, vanilla, and vetiver. It is smooth, masculine, and evening-ready.

name: Born in Roma Uomo Green Stravaganza Eau de Toilette
notes: Calabrian bergamot, coffee accord, vetiver, woods, and aromatic green facets.
description: Born in Roma Uomo Green Stravaganza Eau de Toilette is a fresh woody scent with bright bergamot, coffee warmth, and clean vetiver. It feels energetic, modern, and sharp.

name: Libre Eau de Parfum Intense
notes: Lavender, mandarin, orange blossom, orchid accord, vanilla, tonka bean, ambergris, and vetiver.
description: Libre Eau de Parfum Intense turns the Libre signature warmer and richer with orange blossom, lavender, orchid, vanilla, and amber woods. It is bold, elegant, and long wearing.
